name: boardFootCalc
_note: Reads pieces from artifact.data.pieces (CarpentryShop sends {input: data}, the route mirrors data onto the virtual artifact). BF = (t×w×l)/144 × qty with t/w/l/qty defaulting to 1/6/96/1 on garbage. wasteAllowance = total×0.15, totalWithWaste = total×1.15. Per-piece cost is null (never a fake $0) when no pricePerBF; totalCost falls back to the honest 'Price per BF not specified' string. Empty pieces returns an honest prompt message, not a fabricated tally. Pure compute, no STATE, no NaN leak.
